app.title: Paperloom
app.tagline: Intelligence for your documents. Stays on your machine.

home.heading: Paperloom
home.subheading: Intelligence for your documents. Stays on your machine.

catalogue.title: Tools
catalogue.subtitle: Pick a tool, or chain them on the chain page.

chain.title: Chain builder
chain.subtitle: Add tools in order. Each step's outputs feed the next.
chain.drop-files: Drop files here, or click to choose
chain.drop-hint: Up to {max} files at a time. PDF-only tools accept PDFs only.
chain.no-nodes: No tools yet. Add the first one.
chain.event-cancelled-toast: Disconnected from job. Backend may keep running.

progress.downloading_opf: Downloading OPF model (~4 GB) into ~/.opf/privacy_filter (one-time, runs only on first ever use)…

chain.error-no-input: Upload a file before running the chain.
chain.error-no-nodes: Add a tool to the chain before running.
chain.error-generic: Couldn't finish this run. Try again.
chain.error-bad-request: We couldn't accept these inputs. Check the files and parameters.
chain.error-server: The backend hit an error. Try again.
chain.error-reconnect: Lost connection to the run. Try again.

anonymize.non-en-warning: Non-English input detected. OPF is English-primary; consider switching the preset to {preset} for better recall.
anonymize.install-body: OPF is the detection engine. It is not installed by default because it pulls in torch + transformers (~250 MB) and downloads a model checkpoint (~4 GB) on first run into ~/.opf/privacy_filter. Everything stays on your machine: no telemetry, no cloud round-trips.
anonymize.install-cmd-label: Run this in a terminal at the repo root:
anonymize.title: Anonymize
anonymize.subtitle: Drop a .md or .txt file. PII spans are detected and masked locally.
anonymize.drop-here: Drop a .md or .txt file, or click to choose
anonymize.drop-help: Markdown or plain text. Up to {maxKb} KB.
anonymize.paste-placeholder: Paste any markdown or plain text…
anonymize.phase-downloading_opf: downloading model (~4 GB, first time only)
anonymize.slow-hint: Detection time scales with text size — long documents may take a minute or two.
anonymize.copy-failed: Couldn't copy. Try selecting the text manually.
anonymize.error-too-large: File too large. Paste a smaller selection.
anonymize.span-aria: PII span at character {start} to {end}, category {category}

ocr-to-markdown.title: OCR to Markdown
ocr-to-markdown.subtitle: Drop a PDF or image. Get clean Markdown, page by page.
ocr-to-markdown.drop-here: Drop a PDF or image here, or click to choose
ocr-to-markdown.drop-help: PDF or image · max {maxMb} MB · max {maxPages} pages
ocr-to-markdown.stream-region: OCR output, updates as pages are processed
ocr-to-markdown.error-too-large: File too large. Try splitting it first.
ocr-to-markdown.error-too-many-pages: PDF has too many pages. Try splitting it first.
ocr-to-markdown.error-not-supported: Unsupported file type. Use a PDF or image.
ocr-to-markdown.rotate-confirm: Rotate this file 90° clockwise and re-run OCR?
ocr-to-markdown.copy-failed: Couldn't copy. Try selecting the text manually.
ocr-to-markdown.stopped: OCR stopped. Backend may still be running.
ocr-to-markdown.pre-run-body: Big documents take a while. Convert everything, or limit to specific pages.
ocr-to-markdown.include-figures-help: Crop figures and bundle them in the download.
ocr-to-markdown.figures-none-warning: No figures could be cropped. The captions are still in the markdown.
ocr-to-markdown.figures-partial: {saved} of {total} figures saved. Captions only for the rest (no usable bounds).
